title: Peruvian Style Grilled Chicken Skewers
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make recipe featuring marinated chicken skewers grilled to perfection, served with a side of crispy shallots.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together lime juice, olive oil, aji amarillo pepper, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken to the marinade and mix well to coat.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or up to 2 hours.
Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Thread the marinated chicken onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Meanwhile, heat a tablespoon of olive oil in a small skillet over medium heat.
Add the thinly sliced shallots to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
Serve the grilled chicken skewers with crispy shallots and garnish with chopped cilantro and a squeeze of lime juice.
